docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $278.88 FILED BY PLAINTIFF 300 MONTGOMERY ASSOCIATES A CALIFORNIA PARTNERSHIP
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FUTTON INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
